      PrometheusSheetSheet newSheet(String pName, int pNumRows, int pNumCols) throws OceanusException
      Description copied from interface: PrometheusSheet.PrometheusSheetWorkBookCtl
      Create a new Sheet with the given name.
      Specified by:
      newSheet in interface PrometheusSheet.PrometheusSheetWorkBookCtl
      Parameters:
      pName - the name of the new sheet
      pNumRows - the number of rows to allocate
      pNumCols - the number of columns to allocate

      PrometheusSheetSheet getSheet(String pName) throws OceanusException

      Parameters:

      Returns:
